name: Networking Toolbox
short_description: Collection of many networking utilities - port scanner, IP info, DNS tools, and more.
description: Networking Toolbox bundles offline networking utilities such as port scanner, IP lookup, DNS checker, traceroute, ping, HTTP header viewer, and SSL certificate inspector. Useful for troubleshooting, verifying configurations, and learning network diagnostics.
usecases: Check your public IP and location info.
